title: Add Pixel Asset Forge to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Pixel Asset Forge](https://pixelassetforge.com/) to image
- Generate professional-grade game assets from text and reference images using neural networks with Pixel Asset Forge. Built for indie game developers, artists, and creators.

Fixes #10015

gist.headline: The pixel forge is hot
gist.blurb: Pixel Asset Forge just landed in the community showcase! Now you can generate professional-grade game assets from text and reference images using neural networks.
gist.summary: Added Pixel Asset Forge to the community showcase, a new tool built for indie developers to generate game assets from text and reference images.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover and use Pixel Asset Forge directly from the ecosystem to streamline their 2D game asset creation workflow.
gist.visual_concept: A blacksmith's forge, but for digital pixels. Polly the bee acting as a blacksmith, forging a pixelated game asset (like a sword or potion) on an anvil, representing the 'Pixel Asset Forge'.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, striking a glowing pixelated sword on a small anvil. A chunky robot companion with a CRT monitor head watches excitedly, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting radiating from the forge. Lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes, emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, striking a glowing pixelated sword on a small anvil. A chunky robot companion with a CRT monitor head watches excitedly, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting radiating from the forge. Lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
